title: Data Questions, Displays, Summaries, and Responsible Claims
description: Investigate service wait times and satisfaction while protecting the context behind the data. Learners cumulatively produce a community-service data story through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Formulate a statistical question that anticipates variability and names a population.
Classify variables and evaluate whether a sample can represent the target population.
Choose tables and graphs whose encodings fit the variable and comparison.
